findings.title: ModelEngine-Group/nexent
findings.description: Nexent is a zero-code platform for auto-generating production-grade AI agents using Harness Engineering principles — unified tools, skills, memory, and orchestration with built-in constraints, feedback loops, and control planes.

findings.title: sentrux/sentrux
findings.description: Real-time architectural sensor that helps AI agents close the feedback loop, enabling recursive self-improvement of code quality. Pure Rust.

findings.title: kweaver-ai/kweaver
findings.description: KWeaver Core is a harness-first foundation for enterprise decision agents. It turns fragmented data, knowledge, tools, and policies into governed context, safe execution, and verifiable feedback loops. With semantic modeling, real-time access, runtime control, and TraceAI, it helps AI systems reason, adapt, and act reliable in complex enterprises.

findings.title: hackafterdark/context-sherpa
findings.description: Context Sherpa MCP server provides code mapping, deterministic feedback loops, and tiered inference for AI coding agents to increase accuracy and optimize token usage.

findings.title: dexmac221/C64AIToolChain
findings.description: Commodore 64 toolchain using agents and Google Gemini 3 to develop assembler code for the Commodore 64.  This project demonstrates a workflow where AI models can write, debug, and even playtest 6510 assembly games by providing them with a structured feedback loop involving the VICE emulator and Python-based visual verification.

findings.title: HimanshuMohanty-Git24/RakshaQuant
findings.description: 🛡️ RakshaQuant - AI-powered paper trading for NSE using LangGraph multi-agent orchestration. Features 4 LLM agents, learning feedback loop, LangSmith observability & risk guardrails. Built with Groq, DhanHQ sandbox & PostgreSQL. Paper-first design.

findings.title: AIAnytime/Self-Evolving-Agents
findings.description: A complete implementation of self-evolving AI Agents that improve through feedback loops.

findings.title: Milimo-Quantum/novel-forge
findings.description: Novel Forge is a multi-agent, graph-driven AI authorship platform that orchestrates a fleet of specialized LLM agents to generate, refine, and export full-length novels with iterative feedback loops. Built on pydantic-ai and pydantic-graph.

findings.title: Md-Emon-Hasan/All-About-Agentic-AI
findings.description: Agentic AI refers to AI systems capable of autonomous decision-making, planning, and executing tasks based on goals—acting like intelligent agents. These systems combine LLMs with tools, memory, and feedback loops to complete complex workflows with minimal human input.

findings.title: aidancorrell/arcana
findings.description: Agent-first data catalog. MCP server that gives AI agents the context to write correct SQL — semantic search, auto-documentation, lineage-aware retrieval, and a self-improving feedback loop.

findings.title: srinidhis05/agentura
findings.description: Open-source platform for building, deploying, and improving AI agent skills. Correction-driven feedback loop — every user correction becomes a test, a guardrail, and a reflexion rule that improves future executions.

findings.title: AskKumptenchen/body-emotion-sensor
findings.description: Give AI Agents a "body" with TCM Five Elements logic. Simulates biological feedback loops, organ interactions, and persistent emotional states for LLMs. 基于中医五行理论的智能体持久化情感系统。

findings.title: SudeshRPatil20/MCP-MathMind-Intelligent-math-solver-powered-by-MCP
findings.description: MCP-MathMind – An AI-powered, human-in-the-loop math tutor built with MCP (Model Context Protocol) for tool integration, DSPy for feedback-driven prompt optimization, LangChain for agent orchestration, Groq and Gemini for fast and accurate reasoning, and FAISS for knowledge retrieval. Supports input/output guardrails, web search, and adaptive learn

findings.title: LeadBroaf/mcp-agent-server
findings.description: Open-source, modular “brain” for AI employees. Integrates with n8n and workflow engines, features persistent agent memory, natural language interface, and feedback loops. SaaS-ready, extensible, and easy to deploy with Docker.

findings.title: antlss/gitlab-review-agent
findings.description: An autonomous, context-aware AI Code Review Agent for GitLab. Powered by multi-LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini) with a self-learning feedback loop to enforce repository best practices.

findings.title: MrTsepa/autoevolve
findings.description: AI agent evolving strategies through automated self-play overnight. Generic framework with GEPA-inspired feedback loop and Elo tracking.

findings.title: SecludedCorner/openstarry_doc
findings.description: An AI agent operating system inspired by Buddhist Five Aggregates. Headless microkernel where agents are persistent digital organisms — not scripts. Pain-driven self-correction, control-theory feedback loops, fractal MCP composition, pluggable everything.

findings.title: isWittHere/my-last-feedback-python
findings.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables a human-in-the-loop workflow for AI-assisted development tools such as Cursor, Cline, and Windsurf.  Based on the original work by Fábio Ferreira (@fabiomlferreira).

findings.title: lonexreb/tentalis
findings.description: Managers managing AI agents with appraisal-style feedback loops using RLHF/GRPO

findings.title: BoxiYu/harness-kit
findings.description: Constraints, feedback loops, and lifecycle systems that make AI coding agents reliable at scale.
